name: oid-knowledge-lab
description: Responsible OID knowledge-base crawler and analysis workspace.

scripts.check: node --check src/cli.js && node --check src/ianaPen.js && node --check src/net.js && node --check src/parser.js && node --check src/report.js && node --check src/site.js && node --check src/robots.js && node --check src/sitemap.js && node --check tests/oidKnowledge.test.js
scripts.audit:local: npm run check && npm test && npm run build:site
